description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical brick and siding facade, featuring a prominent central entryway flanked by two sets of stairs and landscaped with bushes and flowerbeds. The roof is a dark, multi-faceted hip style, providing a classic and sturdy appearance. Large, multi-pane windows are arranged in even rows across the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is set back from the street with dual driveways and a central walkway, bordered by planters filled with purple flowers. The exterior combines brickwork on the lower half and horizontal siding on the upper levels and sides. Decorative elements include neatly trimmed shrubs and metal railings on the entry stairs, enhancing the welcoming and orderly look.
description: A two-story suburban house with a brick and siding exterior, hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entryway with landscaped flowerbeds and dual driveways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, dual staircases, symmetrical windows, and landscaped flowerbeds.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the horizontal siding, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway and planters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat expanse of siding with evenly spaced windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing siding, side windows, and the driveway with planters.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double steps, metal railings, and flanking shrubs; no porch or columns.
